name: BAE Systems plc
type: International Prime Contractor / Naval & Land Systems

investment_theses.company_type: International Prime Contractor / Naval & Land Systems

content: BAE Systems plc is a British multinational aerospace, defense, and security company headquartered in London. It is the largest defense contractor in Europe and ranks among the world's largest defense companies. The company provides a comprehensive range of products and services for air, land, and naval forces, as well as advanced electronics, security, information technology solutions, and support services. Key programs include the production of the Eurofighter Typhoon, the F-35 Lightning II, and various naval vessels and armored vehicles, serving government and commercial customers globally.
